Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 607}I usually sleep in a bed, so sleeping on a futon is a new experience for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 607}But I tend to move around a lot at night. I'm worried that I'll end up kicking the girl sleeping next to me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 607}My friend said that this inn is haunted...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 607}But you hear ghost stories no matter where you go. It's all just superstition.[n]{f 1 1}
